policy.ranking_copy_policy: Do not copy ranking text. Store ranking source and position as metadata.

items.title: MaterialX
items.description: Open material-description reference for look development, renderer interchange, and pipeline notes.

items.title: Filament
items.description: Real-time physically based rendering engine useful for material preview, lightweight inspection, and renderer comparison.

items.title: Blender
items.description: Core open 3D application for modeling, animation, rendering, geometry nodes, and production experiments.

items.title: Blender Manual
items.description: Canonical Blender documentation for checking tool behavior before turning Wire notes into practical Articles.

items.title: Houdini
items.description: Procedural 3D and VFX system used as a reference point for nodes, simulation, and production workflows.

items.title: SideFX Labs
items.description: SideFX's toolset for practical Houdini workflows, useful for procedural production references.

items.title: Autodesk Maya
items.description: Character, rigging, animation, and 3D production reference for Maya-related Wire and Article notes.

items.title: Automatic1111 Stable Diffusion WebUI
items.description: Durable open-source reference for classic Stable Diffusion WebUI workflows and extension-based image generation.

items.title: ComfyUI
items.description: Node-based AI generation interface that serves as a recurring reference for graph workflows and reusable pipelines.

items.title: NotebookLM
items.description: Source-grounded notebook tool used as a reference for learning, synthesis, and external memory workflows.

items.title: Obsidian
items.description: Markdown knowledge-base application for local notes, source maps, and long-running editorial memory.

items.title: GitHub Public APIs List
items.description: Large public API index useful as raw material for automation ideas and prototype data sources.

items.title: Tesseract OCR
items.description: Open OCR engine reference for document capture, archive workflows, and OCR-related Articles.

items.title: OpenCV
items.description: Computer vision library reference for image processing, tracking, detection, and reconstruction notes.

items.title: NVIDIA Omniverse
items.description: 3D collaboration and simulation platform relevant to USD, rendering, and spatial workflow references.

items.title: 3D Gaussian Splatting Research
items.description: Primary 3D Gaussian Splatting project page for reconstruction, view synthesis, and spatial capture notes.

items.title: NeRF Project
items.description: Canonical Neural Radiance Fields reference for spatial capture and view-synthesis context.

items.title: Cavalry
items.description: Procedural motion-design application useful as a comparison point for animation and graphic systems.

items.title: Pikimov
items.description: Browser-based motion graphics tool referenced by Wire items about lightweight animation production.

items.title: Internet Archive
items.description: Durable public archive for books, films, web snapshots, and historical reference material.

items.title: Project Gutenberg
items.description: Public-domain book archive useful for literature, source trails, and reusable reference entries.

items.title: Wikimedia Commons
items.description: Open media repository useful for visual reference, public-domain images, and source checks.

items.title: Stanford Libraries Exhibits
items.description: Digital exhibit shelf for maps, visual culture, historical material, and durable research references.

items.title: Claude Code Documentation
items.description: Official Claude Code reference for AI coding workflows, project memory, and agentic development notes.

items.title: Autodesk Flow Studio
items.description: Autodesk's AI-assisted media and 3D production surface, useful for tracking text/image-to-3D and generated-scene review workflows.
